description: Fix SolidJS dashboard crash (WorkplanView.tsx:227 TypeError) and 15+ 'computations outside createRoot' warnings. Module-level createMemo/createEffect/createSignal calls need to be wrapped in createRoot and initialized from the App.tsx composition root.

phases.name: Immediate crash fix — defensive guard
phases.description: Add nullish coalescing guard to WorkplanView.tsx:227 so the spread operator never receives undefined. This unblocks the dashboard immediately while structural fixes follow.

gate.description: Dashboard loads without TypeError in console

tasks.name: Guard workplans() accessor in WorkplanView.tsx
tasks.description: Change `[...workplans()]` to `[...(workplans() ?? [])]` at line 227 in WorkplanView.tsx. Also guard any other spread/iteration of signal accessors in the same file.

phases.name: Refactor workplan store — createRoot wrapper
phases.description: Wrap workplan.ts signals in createRoot. Export initWorkplanStore() function. Move startWorkplanPoll/stopWorkplanPoll lifecycle into the root.

gate.description: WorkplanView renders with zero console warnings from workplan.ts

tasks.name: Wrap workplan.ts signals in createRoot
tasks.description: Replace module-level createSignal calls (lines 49-52) with a createRoot block inside an exported initWorkplanStore() function. Export signal accessors as module-level variables assigned inside the root. Keep the same public API (workplans, activeWorkplan, workplanLoading, workplanError).

phases.name: Refactor projects + router stores
phases.description: Wrap projects.ts createMemo and router.ts createSignal/createMemo in createRoot blocks with init functions.

gate.description: Zero 'computations outside createRoot' warnings from projects.ts and router.ts

tasks.name: Wrap projects.ts createMemo in createRoot
tasks.description: The `projects` createMemo at line 22 runs at module level. Wrap in createRoot inside initProjectStore(). The memo depends on registeredProjects() from connection.ts, so connection must init first.

tasks.name: Wrap router.ts reactive primitives in createRoot
tasks.description: Wrap the createSignal (line 38) and two createMemo calls (lines 42, 59) in createRoot inside initRouterStore(). The breadcrumbs memo depends on projects() so project store must init first. Export route, activeProjectId, breadcrumbs as before.

phases.name: Refactor hexflo-monitor + connection stores
phases.description: Fix hexflo-monitor.ts createEffect and connection.ts module-level signals.

gate.description: Zero reactive warnings in console on fresh page load

tasks.name: Wrap hexflo-monitor createEffect in createRoot
tasks.description: startHexFloMonitor() at line 16 calls createEffect without a reactive owner. Wrap the entire function body in createRoot so the effect has proper ownership and disposal. The function is already called from App.tsx onMount.

tasks.name: Wrap connection.ts signals in createRoot
tasks.description: Wrap the 6+ createSignal calls (hexfloConn, hexfloConnected, etc.) in createRoot inside initConnectionStore(). This is the foundation store — must init before all others.

phases.name: Wire init functions in App.tsx composition root
phases.description: Update App.tsx to call all init*() functions in correct dependency order before starting connections and monitors.

gate.description: Dashboard loads clean — zero warnings, all views functional, HMR works

tasks.name: Add init calls to App.tsx onMount in dependency order
tasks.description: In App.tsx onMount (around line 129), call: initConnectionStore() → initProjectStore() → initRouterStore() → initWorkplanStore() → initConnections() → startHexFloMonitor() → startNexusHealthPoll(). This matches the dependency DAG: connection → projects → router, workplan independent, hexflo-monitor after connections.

tasks.name: Verify clean load + HMR cycle
tasks.description: Open dashboard at localhost:5174, verify: (1) zero console warnings about createRoot, (2) WorkplanView loads without crash, (3) navigate all views — control plane, agents, swarms, workplans, ADRs, (4) trigger Vite HMR by saving a .tsx file — no new warnings or leaked computations.

behavioral.then: Console contains zero TypeError exceptions and WorkplanView renders (empty list or populated)
Console contains zero 'computations created outside a createRoot' warnings

behavioral.given: Dashboard is loaded and showing data
behavioral.when: A .tsx file is saved triggering Vite HMR
behavioral.then: No new createRoot warnings appear, existing data remains visible, no TypeError
initConnectionStore() has already completed (registeredProjects signal exists)
